transitions.name: initiate_environment_deployment
transitions.description: Starts the deployment of the Cyoda environment.
transitions.start_state_description: The deployment request has been received.
transitions.end_state_description: The environment deployment is currently in progress.

process.name: initiate_environment_process
process.description: Initiates the deployment process for the environment.

transitions.name: finalize_environment_deployment
transitions.description: Completes and finalizes the environment deployment.
transitions.start_state_description: The environment deployment is currently in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The environment deployment has been successfully completed.

process.name: finalize_environment_process
process.description: Finalizes the deployment process for the environment.

transitions.name: initiate_user_application_deployment
transitions.description: Starts the deployment of the user application.
transitions.start_state_description: The deployment request for the user application has been received.
transitions.end_state_description: The user application deployment is currently in progress.

process.name: initiate_user_application_process
process.description: Initiates the deployment process for the user application.

transitions.name: finalize_user_application_deployment
transitions.description: Completes and finalizes the user application deployment.
transitions.start_state_description: The user application deployment is currently in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The user application deployment has been successfully completed.

process.name: finalize_user_application_process
process.description: Finalizes the deployment process for the user application.
